text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion is running in the Arima Kinen today,
and her close friend Daiwa Scarlet is among the
competition. And that's not all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur is racing too! She announces that has
no intention of letting Fine Motion go home
without a fight, and the pair trade taunts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fine Motion's final race begins now!
